section.title: Step 1: Identify I/O fan-out
section.p: Action: Locate sequential await calls that could run concurrently.

section.title: Step 2: Wrap in TaskGroup
section.p: Action: Use async with asyncio.TaskGroup() and tg.create_task per call.

section.title: Step 3: Add Semaphore
section.p: Action: Create Semaphore(concurrency); acquire inside the task coroutine.

section.title: Step 4: Add per-call timeout
section.p: Action: Wrap each await in async with asyncio.timeout(seconds).

section.title: Step 5: Lint
section.p: Action: Enable ASYNC rule group; fix violations.
Output: Static guarantee on no blocking calls.
